stemHtml: Which of the following statements is true regarding phase modulation?

options.a: It results in a change of polarisation of the modulated signal
options.b: It is a modulation form used in GPS where the phase of the carrier wave is reversed
options.c: It results in a change of amplitude of the carrier wave
options.d: It is a modulation form used in ILS where the phase of the navigation signals is changed with 90° or 150°
